sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after SPACE
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation

# Compare nodes
before_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in before['nodes']}
after_nodes = {n['id']: n for n in after['nodes']}

print("Before nodes count:", len(before_nodes))
print("After nodes count:", len(after_nodes))

# Check for new/changed nodes
for nid in after_nodes:
    if nid not in before_nodes:
        print(f"New node: id={nid} color={after_nodes[nid]['color']} pixels={after_nodes[nid]['pixels']} boundary={after_nodes[nid]['boundary']}")
    else:
        bn = before_nodes[nid]
        an = after_nodes[nid]
        if bn['pixels'] != an['pixels'] or bn['color'] != an['color'] or bn['boundary'] != an['boundary']:
            print(f"Changed node {nid}: pixels {bn['pixels']}->{an['pixels']} color {bn['color']}->{an['color']}")

# Check ASCII diff around bottom-right corner (where the 1 cell might be)
ascii_before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii
ascii_after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii
lines_b = ascii_before.split('\n')
lines_a = ascii_after.split('\n')
for r in range(63, 58, -1):
    if lines_b[r] != lines_a[r]:
        print(f"Row {r} changed:")
        print(f"  Before: {lines_b[r][-10:]}")
        print(f"  After:  {lines_a[r][-10:]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
